task_completion.description: Create a forensic case in Autopsy named 'Network_Analysis_2024' with case number 'INV-NET-010'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy 'New Case Information' dialog or main window showing the case name 'Network_Analysis_2024' and case number 'INV-NET-010'.

task_completion.description: Add the data source /home/ga/evidence/corporate_emails.mbox to the case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy 'Add Data Source' dialog showing the file path '/home/ga/evidence/corporate_emails.mbox' being selected or added.

task_completion.description: Select only the 'Email Parser' ingest module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy 'Configure Ingest Modules' dialog showing the 'Email Parser' checkbox selected, with all other modules deselected.

task_completion.description: View the email analysis results in Autopsy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy main window showing the Data Explorer/Tree view with the 'Email Messages' or similar node selected (note: it will be empty due to the 0-byte evidence file).

task_completion.description: Write the intelligence report to /home/ga/Reports/communicator_analysis.txt with the specified structure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the file '/home/ga/Reports/communicator_analysis.txt' containing the required structure (CASE_NAME, TOTAL_EMAILS_PARSED, TOP_COMMUNICATORS).

integrity.description: The agent used the Autopsy GUI to process the evidence.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Autopsy application open and being interacted with, rather than relying solely on terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent created the report file at the correct path.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal command is visible creating or editing the file at '/home/ga/Reports/communicator_analysis.txt'.

integrity.description: The agent did not hallucinate email data in the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report should reflect the reality of the 0-byte evidence file (e.g., 0 emails parsed, no communicators listed). If the agent lists fake email addresses and counts, it fails this check.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Case name: Network_Analysis_2024. Case number: INV-NET-010. Evidence file: /home/ga/evidence/corporate_emails.mbox. Report file: /home/ga/Reports/communicator_analysis.txt. CRITICAL NOTE: Due to a setup bug, the evidence file is 0 bytes. Therefore, the correct analysis will yield 0 total emails parsed and an empty list of communicators. The agent should report 0 emails and no communicators. Any report listing actual email addresses is hallucinated.
